description: Teacher panel full functionality: real stats from DB, list of created tests with edit/delete actions, edit test page, working navigation buttons (Jami testlar, Ko'rishlar, O'quvchilar, Daromad, Mening testlarim Barchasi).
steps: 1. Create API route /api/teacher/stats/route.ts: GET returns real stats for the logged-in teacher: total tests count, total views (sum of test results), total unique students, total revenue from paid tests.
2. Create API route /api/teacher/tests/route.ts: GET returns all tests created by the logged-in teacher with student count and average score per test.
3. Update src/app/[locale]/(teacher)/teacher/page.tsx: Replace hardcoded mock data with real API calls to /api/teacher/stats and /api/teacher/tests. Show real stats and real test list.

4. Create src/app/[locale]/(teacher)/teacher/tests/page.tsx: Full test list page (linked from 'Barchasi' button). Shows all teacher's tests with edit/delete buttons, publish/unpublish toggle, student count, average score.

5. Create src/app/[locale]/(teacher)/teacher/tests/[id]/edit/page.tsx: Edit test page that loads existing test data and allows editing title, subject, duration, difficulty, price, questions. Reuse the same form pattern from create page.
6. Add delete confirmation and API call in the teacher tests list - call DELETE /api/tests/[id] which already exists.
7. Add publish/unpublish toggle that calls PUT /api/tests/[id] with isPublished field.
8. Ensure all navigation links work: 'Jami testlar' stat card links to /teacher/tests, 'Barchasi' arrow links to /teacher/tests, individual test 'Tahrirlash' links to /teacher/tests/[id]/edit.
acceptance_criteria: Teacher dashboard shows real stats from database
Teacher can see list of their tests with real student/score data
Teacher can edit existing tests (title, questions, etc)
Teacher can delete tests with confirmation
findings: Build passes. Created /api/teacher/stats (real stats from DB), /api/teacher/tests (teacher's tests with student count and avg score), /api/teacher/tests/[id] (single test with correctAnswer for editing), /api/teacher/tests/[id]/questions (PUT to replace all questions). Teacher dashboard now fetches real data. Tests list page has search, filter (all/published/draft), publish toggle, delete with confirmation, edit link. Edit page reuses same form pattern as create page with pre-populated data. Stats cards are now clickable links to /teacher/tests.
